tables.html:
BehaviourDescription
ImmobilizationThe absence of movement of any limb or head[35]
Moving backwardsThe animal is moving backwards by lifting and changing position of both forelegs or all four legs[36]
FlightThe animal runs (and/or jumps) at least 2 meters away from the trainer
VigilanceHead raised above shoulder height, looking over barrier or side of the pen while upright, ears pointing forwards the direction of the head/eyes
